questions.question: A small portion of the Singrauli Coalfield, which is located mainly in the Singrauli district of Madhya Pradesh, falls in which other State?
Which of the following is located in the west of the Deccan Plateau?
Which of the following countries does NOT share a land border with India?
Manganese nodules are primarily found on:
Which state’s physiography is largely defined by the Indo-Gangetic Plain?
Which of the following is an example of chemical weathering?
The Golden Quadrilateral connects which of the following four major metro cities?
Clear skies, rising temperatures, and moist land — conditions commonly referred to as ‘October heat’ — are associated with which of the following in the Indian context?
questions.option_1: Monsoon Wind striking the Western Coast
questions.option_2: Cyclonic Depressions of Bay of Bengal

questions.question: Why is the Peninsular Plateau considered geologically stable?
questions.option_1: It lies on an ancient shield area with low seismic activity.
questions.option_2: It is part of a young fold mountain system with active faults.
questions.option_3: It lies within the zone of frequent plate collisions.
questions.option_4: It is formed by recent volcanic eruptions and earthquakes.

questions.question: Which lake is an important geographical feature along the eastern coast of India?
Where do temperate cyclones commonly occur?
Which island group lies to the south-east of the Indian mainland?
Which of the following practices promotes sustainable agriculture?
The Congo River is the deepest river in the world. It is located on which continent?
Which of the following crops is grown in waterlogged conditions?
The Northern Plains of India are primarily formed by the deposits of which rivers?
Which plateau is NOT a part of the Patland series?
The Desert National Park of Rajasthan is located in which districts of the state?
Which of the following states is known for its tribal settlement of the Gond community?
What is the main cause of different seasons on the Earth?
questions.option_1: Earth's tilt and revolution around the Sun

questions.question: Wet farming is least likely to be found among which the following Indian states?
The Tropic of Cancer passes through which two northeastern states of India?
Which of the following is located in the northern part of the Eastern Ghats?
Sand dunes that form long ridges parallel to the coastline are most common ______________.
Why are tribal settlements usually located in remote and forested areas of India?
questions.option_1: Due to easy access to modern infrastructure
questions.option_2: Because forests provide natural resources and livelihood
questions.option_3: Because government policies force them to live there
questions.option_4: Because they are not allowed to enter cities
